name: Cheesecake Flan
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the mixture turns golden brown (caramelized).
2. Pour the caramel into a 9-inch round pan.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In a blender, combine cream cheese, eggs, and vanilla. Blend until smooth.
5. Gradually add sweetened condensed milk and blend again.
6. Add evaporated milk and blend once more.
7. Pour the mixture over the caramel in the pan.
8. Place the double boiler on top of the water bath (ensure there is about one inch of water in the bottom pan).
9. Bake for 1 hour.
10. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
11. Invert the cake onto a plate and refrigerate until set.
